summary: Multi-Supplier Feature Backend Testing Complete - All 13 tests passed. Tested: GET /api/ingredients returns suppliers array, POST creates ingredient with multiple suppliers, PUT updates suppliers and syncs default_supplier_id, POST migrate-suppliers endpoint, GET purchasing/suggestions filters by supplier from suppliers array.
critical_code_review_comments: inventory.py create_ingredient (line 78-112): Correctly builds suppliers array from input or migrates from default_supplier_id. Derives default_supplier_id from suppliers array if not provided.
inventory.py update_ingredient (line 114-179): Properly syncs suppliers ↔ default_supplier_id bidirectionally. When suppliers array is updated, default_supplier_id is set from is_default entry.
inventory.py migrate_ingredient_suppliers (line 193-229): Migration endpoint correctly converts old single-supplier format to suppliers array with supplier name lookup.
purchasing.py _get_purchase_suggestions_internal (line 425-428): Correctly filters ingredients by supplier_id checking both default_supplier_id AND suppliers array.
purchasing.py line 508: Suggestions response includes suppliers array for each ingredient.
schemas.py IngredientInput (line 171): suppliers field correctly defined as list with expected structure [{supplier_id, supplier_name, unit_price, is_default}]
seed_data_creation: Test created 3 temporary suppliers (TEST_MultiSupplier_*) and test ingredients which were cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-supplier feature fully tested on backend. All CRUD operations work correctly: (1) Creating ingredient with suppliers array, (2) Updating suppliers syncs default_supplier_id, (3) Legacy format (only default_supplier_id) auto-creates suppliers array, (4) Migration endpoint works, (5) Purchasing suggestions filter by supplier from both default_supplier_id and suppliers array. Frontend testing not performed per request.

TestMultiSupplierIngredients.test_01_create_ingredient_with_multiple_: PASSED - Creates ingredient with 2 suppliers, verifies suppliers array and default_supplier_id sync
TestMultiSupplierIngredients.test_03_update_ingredient_suppliers_sync: PASSED - Changing is_default in suppliers array updates default_supplier_id
TestMultiSupplierIngredients.test_04_add_third_supplier_to_ingredient: PASSED - Can add additional suppliers to existing ingredient
TestMultiSupplierIngredients.test_05_create_ingredient_with_legacy_de: PASSED - Legacy format auto-creates suppliers array
TestMultiSupplierIngredients.test_07_purchasing_suggestions_filters_b: PASSED - Filters work with suppliers array
TestMultiSupplierIngredients.test_08_suggestions_include_suppliers_ar: PASSED - Suggestions include suppliers in response
TestMultiSupplierIngredients.test_09_remove_supplier_from_ingredient: PASSED - Can remove suppliers from array
TestMultiSupplierIngredients.test_10_clear_all_suppliers: PASSED - Can clear all suppliers, default_supplier_id also cleared

TestMultiSupplierEdgeCases.test_03_no_default_uses_first_supplier: PASSED - No default uses first supplier
